name: Black & Grey Masters
description: A curated collection of our finest black and grey realism work — portraits, wildlife, and abstract compositions that demonstrate the full range of tonal mastery.

name: Sacred Geometry Collection
description: Precise geometric and spiritual pieces that explore the mathematical beauty underlying all of nature — mandalas, sacred symbols, and dotwork masterpieces.

name: Colour Explosion
description: Bold, vibrant colour work that demonstrates Ink Rise's mastery of pigment, shading, and composition — from traditional to neo-traditional to watercolor.
